---
title: "AuraLayers.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\AuraLayers.tsx"
loc: 76
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.82
style_score: 3.97
intel_score: 4.63
overall_score: 4.47
---

## Intent
The `AuraLayers.tsx` module implements the visual 'Aura' system for the 3D neural graph. It uses Fresnel shaders to render high-fidelity glow effects around nodes, visually signaling 'Toxic Sectors' (red auras for high complexity) or 'Golden Sectors' (cyan auras for pure logic).

## Interaction Protocol
This component is rendered as a child of individual nodes. It dynamically updates its shader properties based on the node's Gungnir metrics, providing immediate visual feedback on the health and gravity of specific code sectors.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [extend](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [shaderMaterial](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `FresnelMaterial`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `SelectionHighlight`
- `meshRef`
- `FresnelAura`
- `FresnelAura`
- `materialRef`
- `logicVal`
- `isToxic`
- `gungnir`
- `isGold`
